name: Hawkeye
description: Clinton Francis Barton, the world's greatest marksman, never misses a shot. Trained as a carnival performer before being recruited by S.H.I.E.L.D., Hawkeye stands among gods and super-soldiers armed with nothing but a bow, a quiver of trick arrows, and indomitable courage. After the Snap erased his family, he descended into darkness as the vigilante Ronin before being redeemed. He mentored Kate Bishop as his successor, ensuring the legacy of Hawkeye would endure.
